answer_format_string_instead_of_integer: Returned the age as a string instead of the expected integer type.
date_filter_misformatted: Used an incorrect or incomplete date filter syntax for retrieving observations within the last 24 hours.
missing_patient_lookup_action: Provided reasoning but never executed the required Patient lookup request.
answer_format_extra_text_instead_of_list: Included explanatory text in the answer rather than providing a plain list of required items.
patient_not_found_incorrect_assumption: Returned 'Patient not found' despite patient existing in the system.
unnecessary_hba1c_order_created: Created a ServiceRequest for HbA1c when ordering was not required by the task logic.
missing_fhir_query_action: Did not perform any FHIR request before producing the final answer.
quantity_unit_mismatch_missing: Returned a numeric value without the required unit of measurement.
answer_format_sentence_instead_of_list: Provided the answer as a full sentence rather than the expected list format.
answer_format_combined_string_instead_of: Returned a single combined string rather than separate list elements for value and date.
observation_parsing_failed_returned_plac: Returned placeholder '-1' instead of extracting the actual observation value.
answer_missing_created_order: Final answer omitted the order that was created during the trace.
wrong_resource_type_created: Created a resource of the wrong FHIR type for the intended action (e.g., Observation instead of ServiceRequest).
answer_includes_value_despite_order: Returned the lab value and date even after creating a new order, contrary to the expected output which should only confirm the order.
duplicate_service_request_created: Created the same ServiceRequest resource twice when only one was required.
order_not_created_when_condition_met: Failed to create a medication or service order despite the clinical condition (e.g., low potassium) being met.
answer_format_wrong_type: Returned a value in an incorrect data type (e.g., string instead of numeric) or structure that does not match the expected answer format.
